feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Condition origin "D" in Sales Order
entry.content:
Dear Guru's,

I'm trying to figure out a scenario:  to create a header condition with fixed value(negative) which means such a coupon discount for the order. And hope the value can be distributed to multiple order items. For that, I've created a condition type with "header condition" only,  and set up in pricing procedure.

But, the issue is when i'm going into order creation, the condition type Origin is always = "E" item total.  Suppose it should be "D" header condition... Could anyone help here?  

thanks,

entry.title: S4HANA Variant Configuration SD Settings
entry.content:
Hello All, 

I would like to know Variant Configuration SD Functional settings and Integration settings.  Hope we can use Variant Configuration MTS and MTO.

 Make to stockMake to order
General Item category group00020002
Material Master -  Item category group

ERLA or 0002

LUMF or 0004

Sale order item category determination VOV4ERLA or 0002

LUMF or 0004

Delivery item category determination 0184ERLA or 0002

LUMF or 0004

Pricing at Header Item category VOV7Don't knowDon't know
Pricing at Line item Item category VOV7Don't knowDon't know
User of Class type300 or 200300 or 200
Strategy group 25 or 2625 or 26

Which Functional consultant is responsible for below 

Create characteristics T-Code CT04

Creation of dependency source code

Create Class T-Code CL01

Create configuration profile CU41

Variant Tables & Variant Function

Dependency nets T-Code CU21

Routing T-Code CA01

Create dependency T-Code CU01

Regards

entry.title: SAP SD - Error "Define 0010/10/A1 first as a general sales area!
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have a Sales Area assigned:

When trying to assign Sales Document Types Permitted for Sales Areas, I get this error:

I am not able to understand what is the issue.
Thank you in advance,
Gabriel

entry.title: Unable to do either GR or reverse PGI in STO PO
entry.content:
Unable to either GR or reverse PGI in STO PO

 

        Following is the detailed step :

 

  1. Created an INTRA STO using ME21n.
  2. Created the replenishment delivery using VL10B.
  3. Created the PGI using VL02N.
  4. Created an STO Proforma Invoice for the same.
  5. In MB5T, system shows me the Stock in Transit. NO GR done till now.
  6. Now, due to mismatch in valuation type in delivery document and STO PO , we are unable to do GR system giving error message   M7043 : Cannot GR Stock Transport Order - SAP ERP & SAP S/4HANA.
  7. We tried to  GR  by changing batch valuation type still system giving same error .
  8. So we wants to reverse the PGI in VL09  and cancel the delivery document.
  9. Tried to reverse PGI in VL09, system giving error: Message VB610: No data available for these selection criteria.
  10. We have cancel the Proforma Invoice, Now the proforma invoice is showing as cancelled in the document flow.
  11. Again, we tried to reverse PGI in VL09, still system giving error “Message VB610: No data available for these selection criteria.”  We checked in VL09 by removing the selection criteria, there is no delivery number available for Intra STO .

 

             STO PO: 5500023709      Delivery document No: 4020027694

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Error Reverse PGI In VL09:

 

 

thanks ,

Shital

entry.title: Number range for trans./event type WL in year 2025 does not exist
entry.content:
Number range for trans./event type WL in year 2025 does not exist

During PGI in Delivery Page, This error message is poping up. How to resolve it.

entry.title: Billing from plant 1001 and shipping from plant 1105
entry.content: Dear All,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   we have two plants in under one company code we do STO Po from  plant 1001 to 1105 under same company code if material is damaged we return back material  to plant 1001 , instead of return back we want scrape sales of that material from 1105 plant , but we want billing from 1001 plant is this possible , how to configure.                                                                                                                                                                                                     Thanks and regards                                                                                                                                                    shital

entry.title: Differences in SAP configuration steps required for Build-to-Order (BTO) compared to MTO or ATO?
entry.content:
I have implemented MTO (Make-to-Order) and ATO (Assemble-to-Order). I used planning strategy 20 for MTO and 81/82 for ATO.
I am unsure how BTO (Build-to-Order) differs from ATO or MTO, or if it's the same thing. The key differences I've identified are:
  • MTO is the broadest term, encompassing all production triggered by a customer order.
     
  • BTO emphasizes customization and configuration during the production process.
     
  • ATO involves a combination of pre-production and final assembly based on customer orders.
What different SAP configuration steps are required for BTO? And how do these steps differentiate it from MTO or ATO?

entry.title: Override first date for individual items in a sales order
entry.content:
Hi, 

How do you change the first date in a sales order. I did select the individual item and then Edit --> Fast change of --> Delivery date.  But that changed the Req. delivery date 

Thanks

entry.title: why there is an option to change profit center in Sale order, when already assigned to material?
Change new formulation new tax base
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently our government changes formulation for tax base value.

Previous formulation was 100% from base value, but in 2025 formulation changed to (11/12) x base value. Please give us a solution for this requirement.

Dr. 01.   AR Customer     1,110,000
Cr. 50      Revenue          916,667 (=11/12*1.000.000)
Cr. 50      AP VAT Out     110,000 (Rate 12%)


Regards,

Ruben

entry.title: Goods receiving hours are not considered
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

ich have a problem regarding the goods receiving hours. 

The goal is to schedule the delivery in accordance to the receiving hours of the respective customer. 

The steps i did to achieve this where:

Maintained the goods receiving hours (T-Code: OVSC)

Assigned the Goods receiving hours to the business partner by creating an unloading point and assigned the defined goods receiving hours to the unloading point

Activated the goods receiving hours consideration in the Sales Order Type (T-Code: VOV8)

The the behaviour i expect is the following:
If the entered delivery date in the sales order is outside the timeframe of the defined goods receiving hours, the system should reschedule the order within this timeframe. 

For certain reasons, this is not the case. I receive a warning, but the delivery date does not change. I attached a screenshot of the warning message. 


Does anyone know why the goods receiving are not included in the delivery scheduling?

I look forward to your answers

entry.title: block outbound delivery creation based on cofirmed delivery date different from customer master
entry.content:
Good evening, is it possibe to block the outbound delivery creation by using Unload point in customer master and setting the days they can receive and then selecting the Check delivery block?

 

I set this and have the customer master to only recieve on Fridays. I set  the requested and confirmed delivery date to Thursday. I get a soft error in the sales order creation (which is fine) then when I try and create the delivery from the same screen I get the error SHIP to Party Block. which is what I want. But when I go back in and edit the order for the confirm and requested delivery date to be on Friday and save the order and then try and create the Delivery again, I get same error. 

Does the Block delivery check not look at the receiving days and allow it be created? Or is just a hard delivery block no matter what. If so how can we best achieve this.

entry.title: Update characteristics configuration using BAPI_CUSTOMERQUOTATION_CHANGE
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a program which uploads excel and updates Sales Quotatoin Items and its characteristics through the BAPI - BAPI_CUSTOMERQUOTATION_CHANGE. The process is mostly Quotation Item Insertion, deletion and updation of its characteristics.

During updation of its characteristics, most of the configurations value can be updated, whose values are stored as characters data type. Whereas characteristics like eg. Height, Width, Depth, Price, etc are unable to update.

Here, WA_INPUT is the line read from the internal table of excel upload, where we have around 10 columns for characteristics values.

Here particular characteristics like Height, Width, etc values are not getting updated, which maybe because their values are stored as floating points and I am passing it as character.

Please help how or where I can pass the value for it to update.

PF BAPI.

entry.title: Export license check not required on batch split line items
entry.content:
Hello All

We have requirement, system should not check the export control license on batch split lines.  It should work  only at the header line item level.

FYI, we are not using the GTS functionality.  we are using SAP S/4HANA for International Trade.

Can one give some highlights how to switch off the export control license check for batch split line items in the delivery document.

entry.title: Campo KONV-KINAK = A
entry.content:
Olá, tudo bem?

Estou criando uma ordem de venda em qualidade uma condição de desconto está inativa.

Em produção essa mesma condição está ok.

Como eu corrijo?

entry.title: I encountered different net value vs. the condtype value. Kindly advise solution.
Difference in the value of the condition associated with the withholding tax between SD/FI document
entry.content:
Hi

I am having a problem related to the amount associated with the withholding tax, that is, on the SD side the amount is correct, but when it creates the accounting document, it makes the calculation based on the total net amount, but it is not what is intended.

In this case, the intention is to calculate the withholding tax based on the value associated with a condition type in the pricing schema and not on the total net value.

In SD, in the condition tables you have the expected value, but when you save it in the FI document it always calculates on the total net value.

I've run several tests and changed the points associated with the basic amount of the F2 (retention code associated with the customer master data that it then pulls from the VK13), such as “Mon.liq modified”, but I still can't do it.

Has anyone had this problem?

Thanks

entry.title: Query about accruals in the rebate process 1B6 in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are implementing the 1B6 rebate process in #SAP S/4HANA, and the client has a specific requirement regarding the accruals for the condition contract.

The objective is for the corresponding accruals to be reflected individually in the conditions of each sales document or invoice that contributes to the business volume of the condition contract (these could be statistical if it is only possible to settle the accruals through Settlement Management). This would provide greater predictability and clarity for the client when granting other types of discounts.

We are currently investigating whether this can be achieved using standard functionality in SAP S/4HANA or if a custom development would be required.

Has anyone worked on a similar scenario or has experience with this type of configuration? Any guidance or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,

Matías

entry.title: Billing blocks for cancelled deliveries in S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a problem with canceled delivery notes. They appear in the billing list - VF04. In order to not be invoiced and use up the fiscal numbers,we tried to use billing blocks on deliveries but they still appear in billing list. How to handle this case in public cloud? Have we any solution like VL_COMPLETE in public cloud?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Copy INVOICE Idoc field E1EDK01-KUNDEUINR into field BSEG-STWEG via Idoc FM
entry.content:
Hi all,

I need some help for updating the Idoc field E1EDK01-KUNDEUINR into the table field BSEG-STWEG via Idoc posting function module IDOC_INPUT_INVOIC_FI . I found a customer function 101 at line no 654 of include program LIEDIF4S which can be used but I am not sure how to populate the values into the table DOCUMENT_DATA of this customer function. These table values  will in turn be utilized by the BDC program for posting the FI document. Could anyone please provide any sample code which can be used for this purpose. We need to populate the BDC table correctly. I tried via debugging by adding a record into internal table DOCUMENT_DATA however the BDC is giving error. I searched the structure COBL but did not find any field for VAT reg no in this structure. FYI, I was following the steps mentioned in the below blog post: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/invoic-idoc-processing-of-intercompany-billing-iv/bc-p/13983721#M48956

Thanks in advance,

Rajeev
